narrative:
Cols 77-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,221 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
